“Last Friday, our cable car service __________________.  60 passengers _________________ inside the cable cars for about 3 hours. ……...  However, the affected passengers ___________________.”
 is interrupted ……. are trapped……. are terrified
 interrupts ……. trap……. terrify 
 was interrupted ……. were trapped ……. were terrified
 interrupted ……. trapped……. terrified
was interrupted ……. were trapped ……. were terrified

“You may wonder ____________________.  ____________________, we found that the cable
cars were stopped by the emergency brakes triggered by the gusty winds. ………
Unfortunately, one of the technicians was on sick leave, __________________ to
restart the system.”

 the causes of the problem …… Upon investigation ……. a longer time was needed
 what led to the interruption …….Under investigation ………. we need a longer time
 the interruption …….. after investigation ……it takes a longer time
 what caused the interruption …….Upon investigation ……….and so it took a longer time
what caused the interruption ……. Upon investigation ………. and so it took a longer time

“Here are the actions taken immediately to solve the problem.  First, the technical team ______________ the repair work promptly so that the cable car service could be resumed as soon as possible.  Then, all affected customers __________________ a full refund……..”


 will start ….. will offer
 started ….. were offered
 started ….. offered
 start ….. are offered

“_________________ a full investigation and examination of the cable car system to ensure there is no faulty design in the system.  A backup plan ________________ …..”


 We first launched …. was also developed
 We first launch …… is also developed
 We've first, launched …… has also been developed
 We’ll, first, launch ……. will also be developed
We've first, launched …… has also been developed
